name: RhinoPageView
summary: A window that contains a single layout 'page'

methods.name: AddDetailView
methods.signature: public DetailViewObject AddDetailView(string title, Point2d corner0, Point2d corner1, DefinedViewportProjection initialProjection)
methods.summary: Creates a detail view object that is displayed on this page and adds it to the document.

params.name: title
params.doc: The detail view title.

params.name: corner0
params.doc: Corners of the detail view in world coordinates.

params.name: corner1
params.doc: Corners of the detail view in world coordinates.

params.name: initialProjection
params.doc: The defined initial projection type.

returns.doc: Newly created detail view on success, null on error.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap()
methods.summary: Capture View contents to a bitmap.

returns.doc: The bitmap of the complete view.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(DisplayModeDescription)
methods.summary: Capture View contents to a bitmap using a display mode description to define how drawing is performed.

params.name: mode
params.doc: The display mode.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(DisplayPipelineAttributes)
methods.summary: Captures view contents to a bitmap using display attributes to define how drawing is performed.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: The specific display mode attributes.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(Size)
methods.summary: Capture View contents to a bitmap.

params.name: size
params.doc: Size of Bitmap to capture to.

returns.doc: The bitmap of the specified part of the view.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(Size, DisplayModeDescription)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CaptureToBitmap(Size size, DisplayModeDescription mode)
methods.summary: Capture View contents to a bitmap using a display mode description to define how drawing is performed.

params.name: size
params.doc: The width and height of the returned bitmap.

params.name: mode
params.doc: The display mode.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(Size, DisplayPipelineAttributes)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CaptureToBitmap(Size size, DisplayPipelineAttributes attributes)
methods.summary: Capture View contents to a bitmap using display attributes to define how drawing is performed.

params.name: size
params.doc: The width and height of the returned bitmap.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: The specific display mode attributes.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CaptureToBitmap(bool grid, bool worldAxes, bool cplaneAxes)
methods.summary: Captures the view contents to a bitmap allowing for visibility of grid and axes.

params.name: grid
params.doc: true if the construction plane grid should be visible.

params.name: worldAxes
params.doc: true if the world axis should be visible.

params.name: cplaneAxes
params.doc: true if the construction plane close the grid should be visible.

methods.name: CaptureToBitmap(Size, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Bitmap CaptureToBitmap(Size size, bool grid, bool worldAxes, bool cplaneAxes)
methods.summary: Captures a part of the view contents to a bitmap allowing for visibility of grid and axes.

params.name: size
params.doc: The width and height of the returned bitmap.

params.name: grid
params.doc: true if the construction plane grid should be visible.

params.name: worldAxes
params.doc: true if the world axis should be visible.

params.name: cplaneAxes
params.doc: true if the construction plane close the grid should be visible.

methods.name: Close
methods.summary: Remove this View from Rhino. DO NOT attempt to use this instance of this class after calling Close.

methods.name: CreateShadedPreviewImage
methods.signature: public bool CreateShadedPreviewImage(string imagePath, Size size, bool ignoreHighlights, bool drawConstructionPlane, bool useGhostedShading)
methods.summary: Creates a bitmap preview image of model.

params.name: imagePath
params.doc: [in] The name of the bitmap file to create. The extension of the imagePath controls the format of the bitmap file created (BMP, TGA, JPG, PCX, PNG, TIF).

params.name: size
params.doc: [in] The width and height of the bitmap in pixels.

params.name: ignoreHighlights
params.doc: true if highlighted elements should be drawn normally.

params.name: drawConstructionPlane
params.doc: true if the CPlane should be drawn.

params.name: useGhostedShading
params.doc: true if ghosted shading (partially transparent shading) should be used.

methods.name: CreateWireframePreviewImage
methods.signature: public bool CreateWireframePreviewImage(string imagePath, Size size, bool ignoreHighlights, bool drawConstructionPlane)
methods.summary: Creates a bitmap preview image of model.

params.name: imagePath
params.doc: [in] The name of the bitmap file to create. The extension of the imagePath controls the format of the bitmap file created (BMP, TGA, JPG, PCX, PNG, TIF).

params.name: size
params.doc: [in] The width and height of the bitmap in pixels.

params.name: ignoreHighlights
params.doc: true if highlighted elements should be drawn normally.

params.name: drawConstructionPlane
params.doc: true if the CPlane should be drawn.

methods.name: Duplicate
methods.summary: Copies a page view.

params.name: duplicatePageGeometry
params.doc: Set true if you want the page view geometry copied, along with the view.

returns.doc: The new page view if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: GetDetailViews
methods.summary: Gets a list of the detail view objects associated with this layout.

returns.doc: An array of detail view objects if successful, an empty array if the layout has no details.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: (Inherited from RhinoView.)

methods.name: GetPreviewImage
methods.signature: public Bitmap GetPreviewImage(Size size, bool grayScale)
methods.summary: Creates a preview image of the page.

params.name: size
params.doc: The size of the preview image.

params.name: grayScale
params.doc: Set true to produce a grayscale image, false to produce a color image.

returns.doc: A bitmap if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: MouseCaptured
methods.summary: Returns whether or not the mouse is captured in this view.

params.name: bIncludeMovement
params.doc: If captured, test if the mouse has moved between mouse button down and mouse button up.

methods.name: Redraw
methods.summary: Redraws this view.
methods.remarks: If you change something in "this" view like the projection, construction plane, background bitmap, etc., then you need to call RhinoView.Redraw() to redraw "this" view./ The other views will not be changed. If you change something in the document (like adding new geometry to the model), then you need to call RhinoDoc.Views.Redraw() to redraw all the views.

methods.name: ScreenToClient(Point)
methods.summary: Converts a point in screen coordinates to client coordinates for this view.

params.name: screenPoint
params.doc: The 2D screen point.

methods.name: SetActiveDetail(Guid)
methods.summary: Sets the active detail.

params.name: detailId
params.doc: The id of the detail view object to set active.

methods.summary: Sets the active detail.

params.name: detailName
params.doc: The name, or title, of the detail to set active.

methods.name: SetPageAsActive
methods.summary: Deactivates the active details and sets the page view as active.

properties.name: ActiveDetail
properties.summary: Returns the active detail object. If no detail is active, or if the page is active, then null is returned.

properties.name: ActiveDetailId
properties.summary: Returns the id of the active detail. If no detail is active, or if the page is active, then Guid.Empty is returned.

properties.name: ActiveViewport
properties.summary: Gets the active viewport. The ActiveViewport is the same as the MainViewport for standard RhinoViews. In a RhinoPageView, the active viewport may be the RhinoViewport of a child detail object. Most of the time, you will use ActiveViewport unless you explicitly need to work with the main viewport.

properties.name: ActiveViewportID
properties.summary: Returns viewport ID for the active viewport. Faster than ActiveViewport function when working with page views.

properties.name: Bounds
properties.summary: Gets the size and location of the view including its non-client elements, in pixels, relative to the parent control.

properties.name: ClientRectangle
properties.summary: Gets the rectangle that represents the client area of the view.

properties.name: DisplayPipeline
properties.summary: Gets the display pipeline used for this view.

properties.name: Document
properties.summary: (Inherited from RhinoView.)

properties.name: Floating
properties.summary: Floating state of RhinoView. if true, then the view will be in a floating frame window. Otherwise the view will be embedded in the main frame.

properties.name: Handle
properties.summary: Gets the window handle that this view is bound to.

properties.name: InDynamicViewChange
properties.summary: true if the view is being dynamically changed by mouse moves, arrow keys, trackballs, etc.

properties.name: MainViewport
properties.summary: A RhinoView contains a "main viewport" that fills the entire view client window. RhinoPageViews may also contain nested child RhinoViewports for implementing detail viewports. The MainViewport will always return this RhinoView's m_vp.

properties.name: Maximized
properties.summary: (Inherited from RhinoView.)

properties.name: PageHeight
properties.summary: Height of the page in the document's PageUnitSystem

properties.name: PageIsActive
properties.summary: Returns true if the page is active, rather than any detail view. This occurs when the MainViewport.Id == ActiveViewportID.

properties.name: PageName
properties.summary: Same as the MainViewport.Name.

properties.name: PageNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the runtime page number and updates the page number for all of the other pages. The first page has a value of 0.

properties.name: PageWidth
properties.summary: Width of the page in the document's PageUnitSystem

properties.name: PaperName
properties.summary: Returns the name of the layout's media, or paper (e.g. Letter, Legal, A1, etc.), used to determine the page width and page height.

properties.name: PrinterName
properties.summary: Returns the name of the layout's destination printer.

properties.name: RealtimeDisplayMode
properties.summary: Gets the RealtimeDisplayMode active for this view. null if the view doesn't have a RealtimeDisplayMode set.

properties.name: RuntimeSerialNumber
properties.summary: (Inherited from RhinoView.)

properties.name: ScreenRectangle
properties.summary: Gets the rectangle that represents the client area of the view in screen coordinates.

properties.name: Size
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size of the view

properties.name: TitleVisible
properties.summary: Visibility of the viewport title window.
